## Pull Request Checklist

Thank you for contributing to Awesome Online Dev Tools! Please complete
the checklist below before submitting.

### Tool Addition

- [ ] I have tested the tool and it works as described
- [ ] The URL uses HTTPS
- [ ] The tool is free or has a meaningful free tier
- [ ] The tool has a unique name and description
- [ ] The category exists in the list
- [ ] The JSON entry follows the schema

### JSON Format

- [ ] Entry is alphabetically sorted within the category
- [ ] Tags are kebab-case
- [ ] All required fields are present
- [ ] Description is max 200 characters

### Validation

- [ ] I ran `npm run validate` and it passes
- [ ] I ran `npm run sort` (if adding multiple entries)
- [ ] I checked for duplicates with `npm run check:duplicates`

### Description

Please provide a brief summary of your changes:

---

_By submitting this pull request, I confirm that my contribution is made
under the terms of the MIT license._
